channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Spearfisher mauled in Australia's second fatal shark attack in a week
item.description: A spearfisher has been mauled on the Great Barrier Reef in Australia's second fatal shark attack in just over a week.

item.title: Gunman fatally shot after firing at Secret Service checkpoint near White House
item.description: A bystander was also wounded, but no Secret Service officers were injured, officials said. President Trump was in the White House at the time.

item.title: Suspect dead, bystander wounded after gunfire near White House: Secret Service
item.description: The White House North Lawn was cleared by Secret Service on Saturday evening after apparent gunshots were heard near the White House.

item.title: Why Kouri Richins jurors decided Utah mom was a killer
item.description: At Kouri Richins' sentencing for the murder of Eric Richins, her husband and father of their three sons, she declared her innocence to the court.
